refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area to identify terrain features, obstacles, and represent the work-zone accurately.
refined_fr.rationale: Decomposing the broad requirement into specific analysis tasks ensures clarity and testability, focusing on terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation as key elements of worksite mapping.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by generating a digital worksite model/map that includes terrain contours, obstacle locations, and delineated work-zone boundaries, validated against ground truth data or site surveys.
sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and map obstacles within the worksite area.
FR3: Represent the work-zone boundaries and relevant site features.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle detection.
DP2: Employ GIS-based digital mapping and spatial data processing.
DP3: Implement a centralized worksite model database with real-time updates.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle detection.

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain and obstacle detection algorithms.
Integration with real-time sensor data streams.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically groups terrain and obstacle detection using sensor fusion, minimizing cross-module dependencies and enabling modular updates.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of LIDAR and camera sensors in all environmental conditions.
Risk of sensor data inaccuracies affecting model fidelity.
High safety criticality demands robust error handling and validation.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding fallback or complementary sensing methods to mitigate sensor failure risks.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical platform hosting sensors and initial data processing for terrain and obstacle detection.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Transmits processed terrain and obstacle data to NGHE Solution for centralized mapping.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange between Vehicle and NGHE Solution for updates and commands.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as sensors and initial processing are physically on the vehicle; low diffusion risk.
Centralized mapping functions reside here; moderate containment and diffusion due to data aggregation.
Minimal containment; mostly consumer of mapping data, higher diffusion risk if used for processing.
Limited containment; may consume mapping data for safety alerts, moderate diffusion risk.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Sensor data acquisition and initial processing are best contained within the Vehicle module to minimize latency and data diffusion.
containment_risks: Potential overload of Vehicle processing resources.
Dependency on Vehicle hardware reliability for critical data acquisition.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate offloading some processing to NGHE Solution if Vehicle resource constraints arise.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FRs with clear mapping from terrain and obstacle analysis to sensor fusion approach.

diffusion_risks: Data transmission latency between Vehicle and NGHE Solution.
Potential duplication of processing if Teleoperation or Safety Services attempt local processing.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment within Vehicle for sensing and initial processing is appropriate; centralized mapping in NGHE Solution supports integration.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing sensor data acquisition on Vehicle and validating transmitted data at NGHE Solution.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of sensing and initial processing to Vehicle; mapping aggregation to NGHE Solution.

recommended_revisions: Monitor Vehicle processing load and consider modular offloading.
Define clear interface protocols to avoid data duplication across modules.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignments meet the requirements and constraints with acceptable risk and clear module boundaries. No further decomposition needed at this stage.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and map obstacles within the worksite area.
FR3: Represent the work-zone boundaries and relevant site features.

revise.why: Current FR, DP, and IM selections are consistent and feasible.

assumptions: Reliable sensor data acquisition on Vehicle.
Sufficient processing capacity on Vehicle for initial data fusion.
open_risks: Sensor failure or environmental conditions affecting data quality.
evidence_needed: Sensor performance data under operational conditions.
Processing load analysis on Vehicle hardware.
